description_long: This shotgun features a modern, angular design with a predominantly white and metallic finish, accented by dark blue and gold geometric patterns along the barrel and body. The weapon has a compact, tactical appearance, with a short, thick barrel and a robust receiver. The stock is minimalistic and angular, integrated seamlessly into the rear of the weapon, and the grip is ergonomic with a pronounced trigger guard. The top of the shotgun includes a raised rail, likely for mounting optics or accessories, and the barrel is ribbed with a vented design. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and polymer materials, giving it a futuristic, high-tech look suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, modern shotgun with a white, metallic, and blue geometric design, featuring a short ribbed barrel and angular stock. The weapon has a tactical, high-tech appearance with ergonomic grip and raised accessory rail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the angular stock, ribbed barrel, and geometric color pattern.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular barrel opening and the symmetry of the rail and body, with minimal stock visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first but with clearer visibility of the grip and trigger guard details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and rail, with the grip partially visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with ribbed and vented design
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, angular trigger guard with a reinforced, squared profile
